products.name: Dolce Gusto
pros: Compatible with a wide range of Dolce Gusto machines

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo, Assoutenti APS. Altroconsumo's 2025 capsule test recommends Dolce Gusto and Nespresso as best options for espresso, citing quality, compatibility, and value.
videoSource: Migliori Capsule Caffè : marche e prezzi
